{"credits": [{"type": "reporter", "user": {"avatar_url": "https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/19240940?v=4", "events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/ak2k/events{/privacy}", "followers_url": "https://api.github.com/users/ak2k/followers", "following_url": "https://api.github.com/users/ak2k/following{/other_user}", "gists_url": "https://api.github.com/users/ak2k/gists{/gist_id}", "gravatar_id": "", "html_url": "https://github.com/ak2k", "id": 19240940, "login": "ak2k", "node_id": "MDQ6VXNlcjE5MjQwOTQw", "organizations_url": "https://api.github.com/users/ak2k/orgs", "received_events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/ak2k/received_events", "repos_url": "https://api.github.com/users/ak2k/repos", "site_admin": false, "starred_url": "https://api.github.com/users/ak2k/starred{/owner}{/repo}", "subscriptions_url": "https://api.github.com/users/ak2k/subscriptions", "type": "User", "url": "https://api.github.com/users/ak2k", "user_view_type": "public"}}], "cve_id": "CVE-2026-49258", "cvss": {"score": 8.8, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:L/UI:N/S:U/C:H/I:H/A:H"}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 8.8, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:L/UI:N/S:U/C:H/I:H/A:H"}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-639", "name": "Authorization Bypass Through User-Controlled Key"}, {"cwe_id": "CWE-862", "name": "Missing Authorization"}], "description": "## Summary

The web UI (`/ui/*`) does not apply the per-operator CA scoping the JSON API received for GHSA-598g-h2vc-h5vg. Any authenticated non-admin operator (for example, one created via self-registration or OIDC) can access resources belonging to other operators.

## Impact

A non-admin operator can:

- **Block or delete any other operator's host.** `POST /ui/hosts/{id}/block` and `DELETE /ui/hosts/{id}` act on the URL `id` with no ownership check, so a non-admin can block (revoking the host's certificate via the blocklist) or delete any host in the deployment — a cross-operator denial of service.
- **Read every operator's hosts and networks.** The dashboard, `/ui/hosts`, the host detail page, `/ui/networks` (including the create-form error re-render), and the `/ui/events` stream all return data across all operators, exposing host names, Nebula IPs, public IPs, certificate fingerprints and expiry, and network names and CIDRs.

This is the same cross-operator class as GHSA-598g; that remediation covered the JSON API but not the web read/mutation surface. The host create/edit/mobile-bundle/network-create paths and all CA-management routes were already correctly scoped.

Affected handlers (`internal/web`): `handleHostDetail`, `handleHostBlock`, `handleHostDelete`, `handleDashboard`, `handlePartialStats`, `handleHosts`, `handleNetworks`, `renderNetworksError`, `handleHostEvents`.

## Conditions

Exposure requires at least one non-admin operator to exist (self-registration enabled, OIDC, or an admin-created user). A single-admin deployment with no additional operators is not affected.

## Fix

A complete candidate fix with regression tests is ready in a private repository shared with the maintainer (`ak2k/nebula-mesh-ghsa-web`, PR #1): scope these handlers to the session operator's owned CAs (admins keep the full view), mirroring the API's ownership checks.", "ghsa_id": "GHSA-c6v2-3ffm-vcmc", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-06-26T21:29:02Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-c6v2-3ffm-vcmc", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-c6v2-3ffm-vcmc"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-49258"}], "nvd_published_at": null, "published_at": "2026-06-26T21:29:02Z", "references": ["https://github.com/juev/nebula-mesh/security/advisories/GHSA-c6v2-3ffm-vcmc", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-c6v2-3ffm-vcmc"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/forgekeep/nebula-mesh/security-advisories/GHSA-c6v2-3ffm-vcmc", "severity": "high", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/juev/nebula-mesh", "summary": "Nebula Mesh: Web UI lacks ownership checks, enabling cross-operator access to hosts and networks (read, block, delete)", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-06-26T21:29:03Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-c6v2-3ffm-vcmc", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": null, "package": {"ecosystem": "go", "name": "github.com/juev/nebula-mesh"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "<= 0.3.4"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

reasons: 資産不一致または判定情報不足

title: Nebula Mesh: Web UI lacks ownership checks, enabling cross-operator access to hosts and networks (read, block, delete)
